DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF KEVIN ALMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT JANET PARKER SHALL PROVIDE CODE-COMPLIANT VERIFIED RESPONSES AND RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PROVIDE CODE-COMPLIANT VERIFIED RESPONSES AND RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER, SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,650 IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT JANET PARKER AND HER COUNSEL OF RECORD SHALL BE DUE PAYABLE WITHIN THREE WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT JANET PARKER IS ORDERED TO SIGN A RELEASE FOR THE SF POLICE DEPARTMENT. IN ADDITION, PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO RETURN ON 7/17/19 AT 9:00 AM IN DISCOVERY DEPT.302 TO RESOLVE ANY REMAINING DISCOVERY ISSUES. BY 7/15, PARTIES TO PROVIDE JOINT UPDATE VIA EMAIL. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEVIN ALMAN's Motion To Compel.

Off-calendar per request of the parties and approval of Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalanotti. (Email dated 8/5/19)

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Off Calendar Jul-24-2019 Continued To Jul-31-19 At 01:00 P.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Continued To Aug-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Jeffrey Kaiser of Kaiser Gornick LLP 415-857-7400 appeard for plaintiff. / Atty. Michael Smith of Carbone, Smith & Koyama 510-267-7253 CourtCall appearance for defendant.

Matter is discussed, Court rulings that Plaintiff Kevin Alman's Motion To Compel. Amended verified responses due by 7/24, if amended verified responses not received in Mr. Kaiser's office by 7/24, additional sanctions of $959 are due by 7/31. If there are any remaining issues relating to this discovery dispute, the parties shall submit written updates to the JPT via email (cc all counsel) by August 2 and appear on August 7 at 9:00 in Department 301. Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalanotti, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Continued To Jul-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffrey Kaiser, Esq. 415-857-7474 of Kaiser Gornick LLP for Plaintiff.
Michael Smith, Esq. 510-267-7274 of Carbone Smith & Koyama for Defendant Janet Parker through Court Call.

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEVIN ALMAN's Motion To Compel.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel is GRANTED. Defendant Janet Parker shall provide code-compliant verified responses and responsive documents to plaintiff's counsel within two weeks of notice of this order. If plaintiff fails to provide code-compliant verified responses and responsive documents to plaintiff's counsel within two weeks of notice of this order, sanctions in the amount of $1,650 in favor of plaintiff and against Defendant Janet Parker and her counsel of record shall be due payable within three weeks of notice of this order. Defendant Janet Parker is ordered to sign a release for the SF Police Department.

In addition, parties are ordered to return on 7/17/19 at 9:00 am in Discovery Dept.302 to resolve any remaining Discovery Issues. By 7/15, parties to provide joint update via email.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
